title: BEM-866 claude dispatch block
objective:
Run script:
"""
f = Path('.github/workflows/claude.yml')
text = f.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') if f.exists() else ''
lines = text.splitlines()
outdir = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/bem866_claude_yml_dispatch_block')
outdir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
# Mark first 80 lines and lines containing dispatch/input-related tokens.
count = 0
for i, line in enumerate(lines[:120], 1):
    low = line.lower()
    if i <= 60 or any(tok in low for tok in ['workflow_dispatch', 'inputs:', 'trace', 'task', 'role', 'cycle', 'provider']):
        safe = ''.join(ch if ch.isalnum() else '_' for ch in line.strip())[:120] or 'blank'
        marker = outdir / (str(i).zfill(4) + '_' + safe + '.md')
        marker.write_text('# claude.yml dispatch block line\nLine: ' + str(i) + '\nText: ' + line + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
        changed_files.append(str(marker))
        count += 1
summary = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_CLAUDE_YML_DISPATCH_BLOCK_INDEX.md')
summary.write_text('# BEM-866 claude.yml dispatch block\nLines marked: ' + str(count) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(summary))
ops_applied.append('marked claude.yml dispatch block lines: ' + str(count))
"""
No issue comments.
